label: operators_at_devtools_ai_startups
description: Illustrative Tier 2 examples for DevRel, PMM, growth/GTM, engineers, and relevant agency owners at devtools or AI startups. These are grounding examples, not scoring rules.
examples: founding engineer at an AI developer tool
product engineer at an API infrastructure startup
developer advocate at a devtools startup
product marketing lead at an AI coding product
growth lead at a developer platform startup
agency owner running DevRel programs for AI infrastructure startups
notes: Use the Tier 2 scoring rules in icp_spec.json first.
Tier 2 is for strong champion/operator fit at devtools or AI startups, not generic startup employees or generic sales.
